---
name: Feature Proposal
about: Propose a technical addition or optimization
title: "[FEAT]: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Rationale
Describe the limitation in the current implementation and why this addition is necessary.

## Proposed Implementation
Provide a high-level technical overview of the change. 

## Performance & Resource Impact (Required)
- **CPU Cycle Change:**
- **Memory Footprint Change:**
- **Binary Size Change:**
- **Dependency Impact:** (Does this add new crates? If so, justify each one.)

## Zero-Bloat Justification
How does this feature align with the core mission of a minimalist, high-performance terminal music player? Why should this be in the core instead of a fork?

## Technical Checklist
- [ ] I have analyzed the performance impact.
- [ ] I have verified no existing feature provides this functionality.
- [ ] This proposal avoids unnecessary abstractions or complexity.
